name: BulkMail
tagline: Email marketing platform. Drag-and-drop builder, automations, segmentation, A/B testing, analytics. All free, forever.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><defs><linearGradient id="env-body" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#f8f6f0"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e8e4d8"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="env-flap" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eee8dc"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ddd6c8"/></linearGradient></defs><ellipse cx="50" cy="88" rx="35" ry="4" fill="rgba(0,0,0,.15)"/><rect x="10" y="30" width="80" height="52" rx="3" fill="url(#env-body)" stroke="#b0a898" stroke-width="1"/><polygon points="10,30 50,60 90,30" fill="url(#env-flap)" stroke="#b0a898" stroke-width="1"/><line x1="10" y1="82" x2="42" y2="55" stroke="#d0c8b8" stroke-width=".8"/><line x1="90" y1="82" x2="58" y2="55" stroke="#d0c8b8" stroke-width=".8"/><polygon points="14,32 50,56 86,32 50,34" fill="#fff" opacity=".12"/><circle cx="50" cy="55" r="6" fill="#d4a800" stroke="#a07800" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="50" cy="55" r="4" fill="#ffd700"/><circle cx="49" cy="54" r="1.5" fill="#ffe44d" opacity=".6"/></svg>

features.title: Drag-and-Drop Builder
features.desc: Visual email editor with pre-built blocks. Headers, images, buttons, columns, dividers. No HTML knowledge required.

features.title: Automation Workflows
features.desc: Welcome series, abandoned cart, re-engagement, birthday emails. Visual workflow builder with branching logic and delays.

features.title: Segmentation
features.desc: Segment by tags, behavior, purchase history, engagement level, and custom fields. Send the right message to the right audience.

features.title: A/B Testing
features.desc: Test subject lines, content, send times, and from names. Automatic winner selection based on opens, clicks, or conversions.

features.title: Analytics Dashboard
features.desc: Open rates, click rates, bounce rates, unsubscribes, and click heatmaps. Track revenue attribution per campaign.

features.title: Template Library
features.desc: 100+ pre-designed templates for newsletters, promotions, announcements, and transactional emails. Fully customizable.

useCases.title: E-commerce
useCases.desc: Abandoned cart recovery, post-purchase follow-ups, and product recommendations. Drive repeat purchases with automated sequences.

useCases.title: Newsletter Publishers
useCases.desc: Beautiful newsletters with zero design skills. Grow your list, segment your audience, and track what resonates.

useCases.title: Service Businesses
useCases.desc: Stay top of mind with clients. Automate appointment reminders, follow-ups, and seasonal promotions.
